parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { source_type: 'reddit', source: 'reddit_search', payload: $json.body ?? $json, error: $json.error ?? null, fetched_at: new Date().toISOString() } }];

parameters.url: ={{'https://api.gdeltproject.org/api/v2/doc/doc?query=' + encodeURIComponent($node['TN Runtime Context'].json.query) + '&mode=artlist&format=json&maxrecords=' + String($node['TN Runtime Context'].json.max_per_source)}}

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { source_type: 'gdelt', source: 'gdelt_doc', payload: $json.body ?? $json, error: $json.error ?? null, fetched_at: new Date().toISOString() } }];

parameters.query: ={{(() => { const base = $json || {}; const wsRaw = String(base.workspace_id || '').trim(); const uuidRe = /^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[1-5][0-9a-f]{3}-[89ab][0-9a-f]{3}-[0-9a-f]{12}$/i; const ws = wsRaw.replace(/'/g, "''"); const region = String(base.region || 'tunisia'); const safeRegion = region.replace(/'/g, "''"); const arr = Array.isArray(base.signals) ? base.signals : []; if (!uuidRe.test(wsRaw) || !arr.length) return "SELECT 0::int AS upserted_rows;"; const payload = JSON.stringify(arr).replace(/'/g, "''"); return "WITH src AS ( SELECT * FROM jsonb_to_recordset('" + payload + "'::jsonb) AS x(source text, signal_type text, signal_key text, signal_value text, confidence numeric, fetched_at timestamptz, expires_at timestamptz, meta_json jsonb) ), upserted AS ( INSERT INTO market_signals (workspace_id, source, signal_type, signal_key, signal_value, confidence, fetched_at, expires_at, meta_json) SELECT '" + ws + "'::uuid, COALESCE(source, 'unknown'), COALESCE(signal_type, 'trend'), COALESCE(signal_key, md5(COALESCE(signal_value, ''))), signal_value, COALESCE(confidence, 0.5), COALESCE(fetched_at, NOW()), expires_at, COALESCE(meta_json, '{}'::jsonb) || jsonb_build_object('region', '" + safeRegion + "') FROM src ON CONFLICT (workspace_id, signal_key) DO UPDATE SET source = EXCLUDED.source, signal_type = EXCLUDED.signal_type, signal_value = EXCLUDED.signal_value, confidence = EXCLUDED.confidence, fetched_at = EXCLUDED.fetched_at, expires_at = EXCLUDED.expires_at, meta_json = COALESCE(market_signals.meta_json, '{}'::jsonb) || COALESCE(EXCLUDED.meta_json, '{}'::jsonb), updated_at = NOW() RETURNING 1 ) SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS upserted_rows FROM upserted;"; })()}}
